title: Client Partnership Roadmap (Hatch v2)
description: Per-client roadmap consumed by Hatch dashboards. Top-level: flat array of initiative objects. Themes are client-specific (not enum) since each client's roadmap surfaces its own business pillars. NEVER include revenue, opp_size, or Sales-internal context.

theme.description: Client-specific theme. Examples: 'App Performance' (MWM), 'B2C Brand' (SumUp), 'WhatsApp Business' (SumUp). Each client defines their own theme vocabulary; not a fixed enum.

tags.description: Comma-separated. Convention: 'WAITING:Name' for blockers with owner attribution.

pinned.description: If true, renders pinned at top of theme.
